$comment: Phase-8 (ADR-0015) labelled corpus for the deterministic email classifier.
Tier 1 (tier_1_existing_cases): the 12 existing receiving-work case folders under
test-cases-and-data/test-cases/, relabelled to {category, subtype}. Those folders
hold real .msg/.pdf binaries the PURE classifier cannot read directly, so each entry
records the request the intake flow produces for that case (an instruction document
is attached, the provider domain matched, audit phrases fire for the A. cases) plus
the ground-truth label. All 12 are receiving_work.
Tier 2 (tier_2_synthetic): plain-text .eml fixtures authored under triage-corpus/<bucket>/
for the gaps Tier 1 has none of (queries, enquiries, body-only instruction, auto-reply,
bounce). The test parses each .eml (subject/body/from), supplies provider_match_state
here (domain matching is the flow's job), and HTML-strips the body the way the route does.
Tier 3 (real, PII-scrubbed sample mail) is operator-gated [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: the operator
drops real samples into this folder and the suite consumes them. Not fabricated here.

request.body: We instruct you to inspect and provide a report.

tier_2_synthetic.$comment: Phase-8 regression (ADR-0015): a provider chasing a report who RE-ATTACHES the original vehicle photo. Query phrasing + a body Case/PO, an image, and a known provider — but NO work phrase and no instruction doc. Pre-fix this hit Rule 2 (images_with_work_signal) and was wrongly labelled receiving_work, which would create/touch a work Case. Must now fall through to the query rules.

PR #24 review (finding #3): a legitimate automated provider instruction — instruction PDF attached, with a polite 'please do not reply' automated footer. Pre-fix Rule 0 (auto-reply/bounce abstain) fired on the footer marker ABOVE Rule 1 and forced this to 'other', so the Case was never created. An attached instruction doc must OVERRIDE the auto-reply abstain so Rule 1 wins.

Phase-8 regression (ADR-0015): an out-of-office auto-reply that CARRIES an image (a signature logo / bounced-back photo) from a known provider. Pre-fix Rule 0 only fired when there was no attachment, so this skipped the auto-reply abstain and hit Rule 2 -> receiving_work. Rule 0 must now fire on the auto-reply marker regardless of attachments.

Over-promotion fix (2026-06-29): a spam flyer that carries a PDF brochure. The PDF's kind is derived from the file extension alone (.pdf -> 'instruction'), but there is NO provider match, NO work phrase and NO Case/PO or VRM. Pre-fix Rule 1 promoted ANY instruction-kind attachment to receiving_work/new_client_work unconditionally, minting a blank Case. The new-client arm now requires corroboration, so this abstains to other (flagged uncorroborated_instruction_doc).

Over-promotion fix (2026-06-29): a forwarded email from a known provider domain carrying a bare image and no other context — no work phrase, no Case/PO, no VRM, no query phrasing. Pre-fix Rule 2 promoted it on the provider-domain match alone (provider_known was a trigger), minting a blank Case. The provider match now only selects the subtype once another signal corroborates, so a bare provider image abstains to other (flagged uncorroborated_provider_image).
